title: Oairse 3 Pcs Red Artificial Hydrangea Flowers Stems 65cm Faux Christmas Flower Arrangements Fake Floral Picks for Christmas Decorations Holiday Wedding Party Table Centrepieces Décor
features: Set of 3 Luxurious Red Hydrangea Stems – This pack includes three faux hydrangea stems, each 26 inches (65 cm) long with a 5.9 inch (15 cm) flower head. The generous size and full bloom make them ideal for creating eye-catching Christmas displays, large vase arrangements or festive centrepieces.

Striking Metallic Red Finish for Festive Impact – Each bloom features a shimmering Red finish and realistic petal texture to deliver a glamorous holiday look. Perfect show: Red hydrangea, metallic faux flowers, festive floral stems, Christmas decorations.

Durable, Maintenance-Free & Reusable – Made from high-quality silk & plastic components, these artificial hydrangea stems won’t wilt and can be used year after year. An economical and sustainable replacement for cut flowers in seasonal decor, wedding styling and event design.

Flexible Stems for Easy Styling & DIY Crafts – Bendable stems allow effortless arranging, trimming and inserting into wreaths, garlands, foam picks or large vases. Combine with baubles, greenery or ribbons to create bespoke Christmas wreaths, table centrepieces or wedding bouquets.

Versatile Uses & Great Gift Idea – Ideal for Christmas trees, mantelpiece displays, table centrepieces, wedding decorations and craft projects. Comes as a ready-to-use set of 3 — a stylish present for home décor lovers and DIY crafters at Christmas, anniversaries and parties.
